title: salvia nemorosa var. fugax
intro: Salvia nemorosa var. fugax, also known as Woodland Sage, is a variety of the Salvia nemorosa plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Salvia nemorosa var. fugax include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
